calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-12-2006 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-22-2005 Reset To Jan-12-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong.
See also case #542502.
Petitioner: Daisy Gabbay, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: David Gabbay, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony by the Petitioner and without proper consent by the Minor's father, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Jan. 12, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for an appearance or declaration by Minor's father
